title: One step closer
wikitext:
[]: One step closer             Quote Post by V » Thu Oct 09, 2008 1:55 pm http://news.yahoo.com/s/afp/20081009/ennew_afp/entertainmentjapanusgamepsychologyneurosky

[]: !             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Thu Oct 09, 2008 3:01 pm I can't even imagine an Eva character using this. The computer/video game would freak out with so much mind fucking!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Oct 09, 2008 3:14 pm Introducing Evangelion 3-Another MindFuckings.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 09, 2008 4:15 pm I mustn't run away...I mean, I'm so close to level 3! Asuka, you can play after me...Go play Hello Kitty or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Oct 14, 2008 12:23 pm Will I be able to masturbate by willpower only, too?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream Focus » Wed Oct 15, 2008 10:52 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Comparison_of_Consumer_Brain-Computer_Interface_Devices I read articles about other such devices as well. Found places where hobbyest talk about how to make their own cheap EEGs, and list their reviews of the various parts, where they got them from, and whatnot. It'll be interesting to not only play games with our minds, but type, and do other things. And yes, one day we will all pilot giant killer robots, and divide into two teams, one deciding to be evil and trying to destroy Tokyo, while the other fights heroically against all odds to save it.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Oct 15, 2008 11:01 pm I will fight for either side, for I will be a mercenary!
